introSection: Rattler was a wooden terrain roller coaster located at Six Flags Fiesta Texas in San Antonio, Texas, USA. It was built by the Roller Coaster Corporation of America in 1992. The ride is featured in the 1994 film Blank Check.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Rattler opened with the park on March 14, 1992.

In July 2012, Six Flags Fiesta Texas announced that Rattler would close in August.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Rattler opened with a tall first drop, the tallest in the world at the time, which twisted initially to the right, and then to the left. In response to widely publicised rider complaints, the bottom of the drop was later raised by.

fullText:
Rattler was a wooden terrain roller coaster located at Six Flags Fiesta Texas in San Antonio, Texas, USA. It was built by the Roller Coaster Corporation of America in 1992. The ride is featured in the 1994 film Blank Check.

Rattler opened with the park on March 14, 1992.

In July 2012, Six Flags Fiesta Texas announced that Rattler would close in August.

Rattler opened with a tall first drop, the tallest in the world at the time, which twisted initially to the right, and then to the left. In response to widely publicised rider complaints, the bottom of the drop was later raised by.
